variants.title: R650C25
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R650C25. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R650C25 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 83.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.3 mm, Length: 197.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 8 bar, Seal Material: Guarnital, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 8 BAR, Seal: Guarnital

variants.title: R650C25
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 52022 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec R650C25
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 52022 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 85.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 40.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 40.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 198.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 196.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 83.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.3 mm, Length: 197.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 8 BAR, Seal: Guarnital, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: R650C25
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P175115 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec R650C25
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P175115 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.

This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
